testcase.name: createBooking_optimisticLockConflict_retriesWithFreshEntityAndSucceeds
testcase.system-out: 20:39:25.963 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Creating booking for user 1 idempotencyKey flash-sale-idem-key 20:39:25.972 [main] WARN com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Optimistic lock conflict for category 100, retrying once... 20:39:25.973 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Booking 999 created successfully for user 1 concert 10

testcase.name: createBooking_redisUnavailable_fallsBackToDbLock
testcase.system-out: 20:39:25.992 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Creating booking for user 1 idempotencyKey flash-sale-idem-key 20:39:25.993 [main] WARN com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Redis inventory decrement failed for key inventory:ticket:100: Redis unreachable 20:39:25.993 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Booking 777 created successfully for user 1 concert 10

testcase.name: createBooking_withVoucher_voucherUsageSavedAfterBookingWithNonNullId
testcase.system-out: 20:39:26.021 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Creating booking for user 1 idempotencyKey flash-sale-idem-key 20:39:26.037 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Booking 555 created successfully for user 1 concert 10

testcase.name: createBooking_optimisticLockConflictBothAttempts_rollbacksRedisAndThrows
testcase.system-out: 20:39:26.045 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Creating booking for user 1 idempotencyKey flash-sale-idem-key 20:39:26.046 [main] WARN com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Optimistic lock conflict for category 100, retrying once... 20:39:26.046 [main] ERROR com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Unexpected error creating booking for user 1: Object of class [com.geekup.concertbooking.entity.TicketCategory] with identifier [100]: optimistic locking failed org.springframework.orm.ObjectOptimisticLockingFailureException: Object of class [com.geekup.concertbooking.entity.TicketCategory] with identifier [100]: optimistic locking failed at com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService.deductCategoryQuantity(BookingService.java:612) at com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService.updateCategoryQuantityWithRetry(BookingService.java:600) at com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService.createBooking(BookingService.java:274) at testcase.name: createBooking_multipleCategories_allSucceed_decrementsEachCategory
testcase.system-out: 20:39:26.054 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Creating booking for user 1 idempotencyKey flash-sale-idem-key 20:39:26.056 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Booking 888 created successfully for user 1 concert 10

testcase.name: createBooking_moreThanThreeRecentBookings_flagsBookingAsSuspicious
testcase.system-out: 20:39:26.065 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Creating booking for user 1 idempotencyKey flash-sale-idem-key 20:39:26.066 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Booking 111 created successfully for user 1 concert 10 20:39:26.066 [main] WARN com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Suspicious booking detected for user 1 — 4 bookings in last 5 minutes

testcase.name: createBooking_dbWriteFailsAfterRedisDecrby_rollbacksRedisInventory
testcase.system-out: 20:39:26.073 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Creating booking for user 1 idempotencyKey flash-sale-idem-key 20:39:26.074 [main] ERROR com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Unexpected error creating booking for user 1: DB connection lost mid-transaction java.lang.RuntimeException: DB connection lost mid-transaction at com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService.createBooking(BookingService.java:242) at testcase.name: createBooking_duplicateIdempotencyKeyAtDb_rollbacksRedisAndThrowsBookingAlreadyExists
testcase.system-out: 20:39:26.082 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Creating booking for user 1 idempotencyKey flash-sale-idem-key 20:39:26.084 [main] WARN com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Duplicate idempotency key flash-sale-idem-key — booking already exists in DB

testcase.name: createBooking_multipleCategories_secondSoldOut_rollbacksFirstCategory
testcase.system-out: 20:39:26.090 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService -- Creating booking for user 1 idempotencyKey flash-sale-idem-key
